item.title: RaceFace - Race Face Manopole Manubrio Bici Half Nelson Nero Black Taglia Unica
item.description: RaceFace - Race Face Manopole Manubrio Bici Half Nelson Nero Black Taglia Unica qui: ℹ️: Grips HALFNELSON avec 1 collier - noir 🛒 Acquista qui!!
